addProposal(uint256,string).details: The poll must exist and be within the proposal submission phase.

params._description: The description of the proposal.  Requirements: - The specified poll must exist. - The current time must be within the proposal submission period. Emits: - `ProposalAdded`: Logs the poll ID, proposal ID, and proposal description.
params._pollId: The ID of the poll to add a proposal to.

params._groupId: The ID of the group to check.
params._potentialDelegate: The address to verify as a delegate.

returns.isDelegate: `true` if the address is a delegate in the group, otherwise `false`.

params._groupId: The ID of the group where the caller wants to become a delegate. Requirements: - Caller must not already be a delegate in the specified group. - Caller must be a member of the specified group. Emits: - `NewDelegate` event with the new delegate's details. Reverts: - `D_AlreadyDelegate` if the caller is already a delegate in the group. - `D_NotGroupMember` if the caller is not a member of the group.

becomeMemberOfGroup(uint256).details: Adds the group to the user's memberships and emits `GroupMembershipChanged`.

params._group: The ID of the group the user wishes to join.  Requirements: - The user must not already be a member of the specified group. Emits: - `GroupMembershipChanged` event indicating the user joined the group.

params._pollId: The ID of the poll containing the proposal.
params._proposalId: The ID of the proposal to vote on.  Requirements: - The specified poll and proposal must exist. - The voter must not have already voted on the proposal.  Emits: - `VoteCast`: Logs the voter address, poll ID, and proposal ID.

castVoteMeta(uint256,uint256,uint8,addre.details: This function is intended for gasless voting through meta-transactions, allowing      an authorized handler to cast votes on behalf of users. Access is restricted to      the `metaTxHandler` via the `onlyMetaTxHandler` modifier.

params._group: The identifier of the group to which the `_voter` must belong to        participate in this poll. Requirements: - The caller must be the authorized `metaTxHandler`. - The `_voter` must be a member of the specified `_group`. - The poll and proposal IDs must be valid and exist in the system. - `_score` must be a positive, non-zero integer. - Each voter can only vote once per poll. Calls: - `_internalVote` to execute the voting logic and update the vote state. Emits: - A {VoteSubmitted} event upon successful vote casting, logging the poll ID,   voter's address, and score.
params._pollId: The unique identifier of the poll in which the vote is cast.
params._proposalId: The unique identifier of the proposal within the specified poll.
params._score: The score assigned to the proposal by the voter, representing the        weight or preference of the vote. Must be a positive, non-zero integer.
params._voter: The address of the user on whose behalf the vote is being cast.

createPoll(string,string,uint256,uint256.details: This function can only be called by the contract owner. It sets up the structure       and settings of the poll, including the poll phases and score restrictions.

params._delegateEndDate: The end date for delegating votes (timestamp in seconds).
params._endDate: The end date for the poll (timestamp in seconds).
params._group: The ID of the group associated with the poll.
params._maxVoteScore: The maximum allowable score for votes in this poll.
params._pollStartDate: The start date of the poll (timestamp in seconds).
params._proposalEndDate: The end date for submitting proposals (timestamp in seconds).
params._storeOnEthereum: Boolean flag indicating if poll results will be stored on Ethereum.  Requirements: - `_maxVoteScore` must be within the allowable range (checked by `requireMaxVoteScoreWithinRange`). - Only the contract owner can create a poll.  Emits: - `PollCreated`: Emitted upon successful poll creation, logging the poll ID, title,    and whether the results will be stored on Ethereum.
params._votingStartDate: The start date for voting in the poll (timestamp in seconds).

createPrediction(uint256,uint256,string).details: The proposal must exist before a prediction can be created. The prediction ID is auto-incremented.

params._pollId: The ID of the poll where the prediction is being created.
params._prediction: The content of the prediction. Requirements: - The proposal identified by `_pollId` and `_proposalId` must exist. Emits: - `PredictionCreated`: Logs the poll ID, proposal ID, prediction ID, and prediction text.
params._proposalId: The ID of the proposal associated with the prediction.

params._delegate: The address of the delegate to whom the vote is delegated.
params._groupId: The ID of the group in which the delegation is made. Requirements: - `_delegate` must be a valid delegate in `_groupId`. - Caller must be a member of `_groupId`. - Caller cannot delegate to themselves. - Caller cannot delegate multiple times to the same delegate in the same group. Emits: - `NewDelegation` event with details of the delegation. Reverts: - `SH_InvalidDelegation` if `_delegate` is not a valid delegate in the group. - `D_NotGroupMember` if caller is not a member of the group. - `SH_CannotDelegateToSelf` if caller attempts to delegate to themselves. - `D_AlreadyDelegate` if caller has already delegated to `_delegate` in `_groupId`.

finalizeAndBridge(uint256).details: This function finalizes the poll, calculates the result hash, and, if configured,      sends the result to an external chain via the bridge contract.

params._pollId: The unique identifier of the poll to finalize and potentially bridge. Requirements: - The poll identified by `_pollId` must exist. - The poll must not have already been finalized. - The poll’s end date must have passed (`block.timestamp` >= `endDate`). - If bridging is required, the `bridgeContract` address must be set. Details: - Marks the poll as finalized and calculates a `resultHash` based on the poll ID,   proposal count, end date, and combined vote data (via `calculateVotesHash`). - Emits a `PollFinalized` event with the result hash and a boolean indicating whether   results are stored on Ethereum. - If `storeOnEthereum` is true, the function checks that the `bridgeContract` address is set,   then calls `bridgeResults` on the bridge contract to relay the poll result to the external chain. Emits: - A {PollFinalized} event with the poll ID, result hash, and boolean for on-chain storage. - A {PollBridgedToEthereum} event with the poll ID and result hash if the poll is bridged.

The unique identifier of the poll to finalize. Requirements: - The poll identified by `_pollId` must exist. - The poll must not have been previously finalized. - The poll’s end date must have passed (`block.timestamp` should be greater than or equal to `endDate`). Details: - Marks the poll as finalized by setting `poll.settings.finalized` to `true`. - Computes the `resultHash` using `keccak256`, based on the poll ID, proposal count,   poll end date, and a combined hash of all votes (using `calculateVotesHash`). - If `storeOnEthereum` is true, emits detailed vote data for each proposal, including:   - `ProposalVotes` event with the vote count and total score for each proposal.   - `IndividualVotes` event capturing the total score from each proposal cast by `msg.sender`. Emits: - A {PollFinalized} event with the poll ID, result hash, and a boolean indicating whether   the results are stored on Ethereum. - If `storeOnEthereum` is true, additional {ProposalVotes} and {IndividualVotes} events   are emitted for each proposal within the poll.

params._user: The address of the user to retrieve group memberships for.

returns._0: memberGroups An array of group IDs that the user is a member of.
memberGroups An array of group IDs that the user is a member of.

params._pollId: The ID of the poll to retrieve.

returns._0: A `Poll` structure containing the details and settings of the specified poll. Requirements: - The poll with `_pollId` must exist. Reverts: - `PH_PollDoesNotExist` if the poll with the specified `_pollId` does not exist.

params._pollId: The ID of the poll to retrieve results from.

returns.proposalDescriptions: An array of descriptions for each proposal.
returns.scores: An array of scores for each proposal.  Requirements: - The specified poll must exist.
returns.voteCounts: An array of vote counts for each proposal.

params._pollId: The ID of the poll associated with the bets.
params._predictionId: The ID of the prediction associated with the bets.
params._proposalId: The ID of the proposal associated with the bets.

returns._0: An array of PredictionBet structs representing all bets placed on the specified prediction.  Requirements: - The specified poll, proposal, and prediction must exist. - There must be bets placed on the prediction.  Reverts: - If no bets are placed on the specified prediction.

getPredictions(uint256,uint256).details: The proposal must exist before predictions can be retrieved.

params._pollId: The ID of the poll containing the proposal.
params._proposalId: The ID of the proposal for which predictions are being retrieved.

returns._0: An array of Prediction structs representing all predictions for the given proposal. Requirements: - The proposal identified by `_pollId` and `_proposalId` must exist.

params._pollId: The ID of the poll.

returns._0: The proposal struct.  Requirements: - The specified proposal must exist within the poll.

params._pollId: The ID of the poll to retrieve proposals from.

returns._0: An array of Proposal structs representing all proposals in the specified poll.  Requirements: - The specified poll must exist.

getResult(uint256).details: Retrieves the result of a specified poll if it has been finalized and is not stored on Ethereum.

params._pollId: The unique identifier of the poll.

returns._0: bytes32 The hash of the result for the specified poll. Requirements: - The poll identified by `_pollId` must be finalized. - The result must not be stored directly on Ethereum (`storeOnEthereum` should be `false`). Details: - Accesses the `polls` mapping to load the poll’s settings and validate its finalization status. - If requirements are met, returns the `resultHash`, which represents the off-chain result of the poll.

params._groupId: The ID of the group to check for an active delegation.

returns._0: `true` if the caller has delegated in the group, otherwise `false`.

params._delegate: The address of the delegate to verify.
params._groupId: The ID of the group to check.

returns._0: `true` if the caller has delegated to `_delegate` in the group, otherwise `false`.

hasUserVoted(uint256,address).details: Checks if a user has already voted in a specified poll.

params._pollId: The unique identifier of the poll.
params._user: The address of the user being checked.

returns._0: bool `true` if the user has voted in the specified poll, otherwise `false`. Details: - Uses the `votersForPoll` mapping to determine if `_user` has previously voted in `_pollId`. - Provides a quick way to verify user voting status without altering any state.

hasUserVotedAsDelegate(uint256,address).details: Checks if a user has already voted as a delegate in a specified poll.

params._pollId: The unique identifier of the poll.
params._user: The address of the user being checked.

returns._0: bool `true` if the user has voted as a delegate in the specified poll, otherwise `false`. Details: - Uses the `delegateVotersForPoll` mapping to determine if `_user` has cast a vote as a delegate   in `_pollId`. - This function allows quick verification of delegate voting status without modifying any state.

params._group: The ID of the group to check.
params._user: The address of the user to check.

returns.isMember: `true` if the user is a member of the group; otherwise, `false`.

params._group: The ID of the group to check.

returns.isMember: `true` if the caller is a member of the group; otherwise, `false`.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

placePredictionBet(uint256,uint256,uint2.details: Ensures that the poll, proposal, and prediction exist, and the likelihood is greater than 0 before placing the bet.

params._bet: Boolean indicating whether the user is betting for or against the prediction. Requirements: - `_likelihood` must be greater than zero.  Emits: - `PredictionBetCreated`: Emitted with the prediction ID, bet direction, and likelihood score.  Reverts: - `PB_InvalidLikelihood` if `_likelihood` is zero.
params._likelihood: The likelihood score given by the user for the prediction.
params._pollId: The ID of the poll associated with the bet.
params._predictionId: The ID of the prediction being bet on.
params._proposalId: The ID of the proposal associated with the bet.

params._pollId: The ID of the poll containing the proposal.
params._proposalId: The ID of the proposal to vote on.
params.voter: The address of the voter.  Requirements: - Only the MetaVoting contract can call this function. - The specified poll and proposal must exist. - The voter must not have already voted on the proposal.

params._delegate: The address of the delegate from whom the vote is being removed.
params._groupId: The ID of the group where the delegation is being removed. Requirements: - Caller must have an active delegation to `_delegate` in `_groupId`. Emits: - `DelegationRemoved` event with details of the removed delegation. Reverts: - `D_NoDelegationToRemove` if the caller does not have a delegation to `_delegate` in `_groupId`.

removeGroupMembership(uint256).details: Removes the group from the user's memberships and emits `GroupMembershipChanged`.

params._group: The ID of the group the user wishes to leave.  Requirements: - The user must already be a member of the specified group. Emits: - `GroupMembershipChanged` event indicating the user left the group.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions anymore. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby removing any functionality that is only available to the owner.

params._groupId: The ID of the group from which the caller wants to resign as a delegate. Requirements: - Caller must be an active delegate in `_groupId`. Effects: - Removes the caller as a delegate from `_groupId`. - Updates delegations of users who had delegated to the caller in `_groupId`. Emits: - `DelegateResignation` event with the caller's address and group ID. Reverts: - `Delegate not found` if the caller is not an active delegate in the specified group.

setBridgeContract(address).details: This function can only be called by the contract owner.

params._bridgeContract: The address of the new bridge contract. Requirements: - Caller must be the contract owner. Details: - Updates the `bridgeContract` state variable to the specified `_bridgeContract` address. - The bridge contract is used for interactions between this contract and other chains.

setMetaTxHandler(address).custom:requirement: Ensure the `_metaTxHandler` address is a trusted address.
setMetaTxHandler(address).details: This function can only be called by the contract owner. The specified address will      be authorized to submit meta-transactions on behalf of other users, which allows      for gasless transactions.

params._metaTxHandler: The new address to set as the meta-transaction handler.

setMetaVoting(address).details: This function is restricted to the contract owner. It assigns the `_metaVoting`      address to the `metaVoting` state variable, allowing interaction with an      external MetaVoting contract for enhanced voting operations.

params._metaVoting: The address of the MetaVoting contract to be set. Requirements: - Caller must be the contract owner.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

params._pollId: The ID of the poll containing the proposal.
params._proposalId: The ID of the proposal to update.
params.scoreIncrease: The amount to increase the score by.  Requirements: - The specified proposal must exist. - Either `voteIncrease` or `scoreIncrease` must be greater than zero.  Emits: - `ProposalUpdated`: Logs the poll ID, proposal ID, new vote count, and new score.
params.voteIncrease: The amount to increase the vote count by.

vote(uint256,uint256,uint8,uint256).details: This function is a public-facing wrapper that calls `_internalVote` to handle      the voting logic, ensuring the vote is processed according to internal rules.

params._group: The identifier of the group to which the voter should belong to        participate in this poll. Requirements: - The caller must be a member of the specified `_group`. - The poll and proposal IDs must be valid and exist in the system. - `_score` must be a positive, non-zero integer. - Each voter can only vote once per poll. Calls: - `_internalVote` to handle the core voting logic, validation, and state updates.
params._pollId: The unique identifier of the poll in which the vote is cast.
params._proposalId: The unique identifier of the proposal within the specified poll.
params._score: The score the voter assigns to the proposal, indicating the preference        or weight of their vote. Must be a positive, non-zero integer.

voteAsDelegate(uint256,uint256,uint8,add.details: This function enables delegate voting, allowing an authorized delegate to submit a vote with      their delegated voting power. If the caller is not `metaTxHandler`, they must be the delegate      casting the vote. Each delegate can only vote once per poll.

params._pollId: The unique identifier of the poll in which the delegate is voting.
params._proposalId: The unique identifier of the proposal within the specified poll.
params._score: The score or weight the delegate assigns to the proposal. Must be a positive, non-zero integer.
params.delegate: The address of the delegate casting the vote on behalf of others. Requirements: - The poll identified by `_pollId` and proposal identified by `_proposalId` must exist. - `_score` must be a positive, non-zero integer. - The caller must either be the delegate themselves or, if using a meta-transaction,   the `metaTxHandler`. - The delegate can only vote once per poll, enforced by the `delegateVotersForPoll` mapping. - The delegate must have a valid delegated voting power within the poll’s group, determined by   `_getDelegatedVotes`. Details: - Calculates the effective vote score by multiplying `_score` with the delegate’s voting power. - Calls `updateProposalVotes` to update the total votes for the proposal with the effective score. Emits: - A {VoteSubmitted} event with the poll ID, delegate address, and calculated vote score.

addProposal(uint256,string).notice: Adds a new proposal to a poll.

addressIsDelegate(uint256,address).notice: Checks if a specified address is a delegate within a given group.

becomeDelegate(uint256).notice: Registers the caller as a delegate in a specified group.

becomeMemberOfGroup(uint256).notice: Allows a user to join a specified group.

castVote(uint256,uint256).notice: Casts a vote on a specific proposal within a poll.

castVoteMeta(uint256,uint256,uint8,addre.notice: Allows the meta-transaction handler to submit a vote on behalf of a user.

createPoll(string,string,uint256,uint256.notice: Creates a new poll with specified details and settings.

createPrediction(uint256,uint256,string).notice: Creates a new prediction for a specific proposal within a poll.

delegateToDelegate(address,uint256).notice: Delegates the caller's vote to a specified delegate within a group.

finalizeAndBridge(uint256).notice: Finalizes a poll and bridges its result to an external chain if specified.

finalizePoll(uint256).notice: Finalizes a poll by setting its finalized status, calculating its result hash,         and optionally emitting proposal and individual vote data if stored on Ethereum.

getGroupsAddressIsMemberIn(address).notice: Retrieves the list of all groups a specific address is a member of.

getGroupsUserIsMemberIn().notice: Retrieves the list of all groups that the user is a member of.

getPoll(uint256).notice: Retrieves the details of a specified poll.

getPollResults(uint256).notice: Retrieves descriptions, vote counts, and scores for all proposals within a poll.

getPredictionBets(uint256,uint256,uint25.notice: Retrieves the prediction bets placed on a specific proposal within a poll.

getPredictions(uint256,uint256).notice: Retrieves all predictions associated with a specific proposal in a poll.

getProposal(uint256,uint256).notice: Retrieves a specific proposal within a poll.

getProposals(uint256).notice: Retrieves all proposals associated with a specific poll.

hasDelegatedInGroup(uint256).notice: Checks if the caller has an active delegation in a specified group.

hasDelegatedToDelegateInGroup(uint256,ad.notice: Checks if the caller has delegated their vote to a specific delegate within a given group.

isAddressMemberOfGroup(address,uint256).notice: Checks if a specific address is a member of a specified group.

isUserMemberOfGroup(uint256).notice: Checks if the caller is a member of a specified group.

placePredictionBet(uint256,uint256,uint2.notice: Places a new prediction bet for a specific poll, proposal, and prediction.

predictionBets(uint256,uint256,uint256).notice: Maps a poll ID to an array of PredictionBet structures representing all bets made in that poll.

predictions(uint256,uint256).notice: Mapping from a proposal ID to an array of predictions related to that proposal.

recordMetaVote(uint256,uint256,address).notice: Records a meta-transaction vote on a proposal within a poll.

removeDelegation(address,uint256).notice: Removes the caller's delegation to a specified delegate within a group.

removeGroupMembership(uint256).notice: Allows a user to leave a specified group.

resignAsDelegate(uint256).notice: Allows the caller to resign as a delegate in a specified group.

setBridgeContract(address).notice: Sets the address of the bridge contract used for cross-chain communication.

setMetaTxHandler(address).notice: Updates the address authorized to handle meta-transactions.

setMetaVoting(address).notice: Sets the address of the MetaVoting contract.

updateProposalVotes(uint256,uint256,uint.notice: Updates the vote count and score of a specific proposal.

vote(uint256,uint256,uint8,uint256).notice: Allows a user to cast a vote for a specific proposal within a poll.

voteAsDelegate(uint256,uint256,uint8,add.notice: Allows a delegate to cast a vote on behalf of others within a specific poll and proposal.
